turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Hey B, so about that sprint retrospective from last week. I think we should start. What went well for you?

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Uh, yeah, sure. For me, the daily standups were great. They kept everyone on track without taking too much time. What about you?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Totally agree on standups. They were super efficient. But, man, the code reviews... they dragged on forever. We need to cut that down.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Code reviews? I thought they were okay. Yeah, sometimes slow, but they caught that big bug in the payment module. Remember? Without them, we'd be screwed.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: True, that bug was nasty. But still, too much time spent. Hey, tangent—did you see the new coffee machine in the kitchen? Way better than the old sludge.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Haha, yeah, finally! No more burnt taste. Back to retros—another good thing was the pairing sessions. Me and you on that API refactor? Productive as hell.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Pairing was solid, no doubt. Helped us move fast. What didn't go well for you? I'm still hung up on those reviews.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Hmm, maybe the task board. It got messy halfway through. Tickets piling up in 'In Progress'—nobody updating status. Felt chaotic.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Oh yeah, the board. Totally chaotic. We should enforce updates better. Or maybe switch tools? Jira's clunky anyway.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Jira's not that bad. Anyway, for improvements, shorter standups? No, wait, they were fine. Uh, more automated tests upfront.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Tests, yes. We wasted time debugging later. Okay, my big gripe was still code reviews—too many rounds, blocking deploys.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Alright, fair. But they did save us. What if we limit to two rounds max?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Two rounds? That could work. Actually, thinking about it, maybe they weren't *that* bad. We learned a lot from the feedback.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Wait, didn't you just say they dragged on forever and were your big gripe? Now you're okay with them?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Uh, well, yeah, but in context of the whole sprint, the pros outweighed. Anyway, action items: cleaner board, more tests. Cool?

input.objective: Sprint retrospective on code reviews, standups, and task management
